creator: transitive@gmail.com
text:
Setting options without NLS support and building with poudriere causes the port to fail to build at the patch phase as follows:

More information about port maintainership is available at:

https://docs.freebsd.org/en/articles/contributing/#ports-contributing

===>  License GPLv2 accepted by the user
===> Fetching all distfiles required by wxmaxima-20.04.0_2 for building
===>  Extracting for wxmaxima-20.04.0_2
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for wxMaxima-Developers-wxmaxima-Version-20.04.0_GH0.tar.gz.
===========================================================================
=======================<phase: patch-depends  >============================
===========================================================================
=======================<phase: patch          >============================
===>  Patching for wxmaxima-20.04.0_2
===>  Applying extra patch /usr/ports/math/wxmaxima/files/extra-patch-CMakeLists.txt
cat: /usr/ports/math/wxmaxima/files/extra-patch-CMakeLists.txt: No such file or directory
===>  FAILED Applying extra patch /usr/ports/math/wxmaxima/files/extra-patch-CMakeLists.txt
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/math/wxmaxima
=>> Cleaning up wrkdir
===>  Cleaning for wxmaxima-20.04.0_2
build of math/wxmaxima | wxmaxima-20.04.0_2 ended at Tue Jul 20 08:36:59 EDT 2021
build time: 00:00:07
!!! build failure encountered !!!
 
Not sure why that happened. Anyways, thanks for the help trying to fix the issue.
